toolkit_version.description: Pinned version of tw-ai-toolkit (semver tag). Example: v1.0.0

enabled_components.description: Component types to enable. Omit to enable all.

disabled_skills.description: List of skill names to disable in this repo (without tw- prefix).

local_overrides.description: Whether to allow local .ai/skills/, .ai/agents/, etc. overrides.

mcp_servers.description: MCP servers to activate for this repo.

name.description: MCP server name as defined in mcp/<name>/server.md

env_file.description: Path to the .env file relative to consumer repo root.

update_strategy.description: How the toolkit is updated in this repo.

auto_load_l2.description: Whether the assistant should auto-load registry.json at session start.

snapshot_ttl_hours.description: How old (in hours) a snapshot can be before the assistant should warn about staleness.

secrets.description: Secrets provider configuration. Controls how the toolkit loads credentials.

provider.description: Where to load secrets from. Defaults to env_file (.env).

aws.description: AWS Secrets Manager configuration. Used when provider=aws_secrets_manager.

secret_name.description: Secret name or ARN in Secrets Manager

prefix.description: Optional key prefix within the secret JSON

vault.description: HashiCorp Vault configuration. Used when provider=vault.

path.description: KV path to the secret (e.g. secret/tw-ai-toolkit)

gcp.description: GCP Secret Manager configuration. Used when provider=gcp_secret_manager.

azure.description: Azure Key Vault configuration. Used when provider=azure_key_vault.
